## utm-dev cleanup cache-only

Remove only cache files (keeps SDKs)

### Synopsis

Removes only the cache directory, keeping all installed SDKs intact.

```
utm-dev cleanup cache-only [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for cache-only
```
